purpose: Release-management guide for shipping desktop builds tracking the master branch via electron-updater. Describes the auto-update flow, two release options (auto-on-master vs build-on-master/release-on-tag), version bump strategy, and required macOS signing/notarization secrets in GitHub Actions.
gotchas: Without code signing on macOS, auto-update behavior is degraded and Gatekeeper warnings appear
Auto-update check runs 10 seconds after launch, downloads in background
patterns: Push-event update broadcasting to renderer (update-status channel)
conventions: Commit markers #minor / #major to override default patch bump
